title: Lucent Client
description: The only PvP and FPS Modpack you'll ever need!
body:
# About LucentClient
LucentClient is a lightweight, optimized Fabric-based modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience with stunning visuals, seamless textures, and quality-of-life improvements—all while maintaining excellent performance.
![Lucent Client logo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20ab8a86b5047718988a758b19c1d22c60d9c436_0.webp)

# Features
✅ Optimized Gameplay – Smooth mouse controls and performance tweaks.

✅ PvP Client – Our client is a very efficient PvP client too!

✅ Works With:


🟢 Windows

🟢 Debian-based Linux Distros

🟢 Modrinth App

🟢 Prism Launcher

🟢 ATLauncher

Always use the latest LucentClient version for the best experience.

## Installation (Modrinth App)

Download & Install the Modrinth App.

Login with your Minecraft account.

Browse on the left sidebar.

Search for LucentClient.

Download & Install the first result.

Versioning System

LucentClient follows a structured versioning format:


# Support & Community
Join our discord for support.
